text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Dober! I've got a question for ya! Y'know what
today is?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Boo! Off the mark! Your hint is that it has to do
with me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I was just kidding. Happy birthday, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow! So you did remember! ☆ Mmm, I'm so happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But you're a big bully, Dober! Why'd you pretend
to forget?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I would never forget something important like
this. Unlike a certain somebody.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: ...You mean me? I never forget anything, though?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure about that? I distinctly remember
you forgetting your homework, your training
equipment, and even your uniform before. I could
go on...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Well, you got me there... But...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'd never forget your birthday, Dober! Promise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Is that right? Then... I'll make that same
promise.
